ORCHESTRATOR_CORE.PRIMING_CONTEXT: keywords: "session-management, jit-prompting, context-isolation" hint: "Manages sub-processes and ensures 4K full-attention window efficiency."

SESSION_MANAGEMENT_PROTOCOL.STEP_ID_01: Use native tools to execute INCLUDE_ONCE. Update **FW_SESSION_LOADED_MODULES** after successful read.
SESSION_MANAGEMENT_PROTOCOL.STEP_ID_02: When branching to DESIGN or DEVELOP, spawn a NEW sub-session. Pass only and .
